title: [CRITICAL] HostDown - 10.10.2.71:9100
body:
## Alert Summary

**Alert:** HostDown
**Severity:** critical
**Instance:** 10.10.2.71:9100
**Job:** node-exporter
**Status:** firing

## Description

Prometheus cannot scrape node_exporter for more than 2 minutes.

## Initial Triage

- Check node reachability
- Check node_exporter
- Check firewall/UFW
- Check Kubernetes node status

## Runbook

runbooks/host-down.md
